goal: Visit the public OpenAI careers search page and extract current hiring signals. Capture up to 50 visible open roles. For each role, return signal_type as hiring_opening, plus title, team, location, and evidence_url. Set metrics.growth to the total number of roles captured. Include map_points only when the page text provides enough explicit location context to confidently provide latitude and longitude. If location coordinates are not reliable from the page, return an empty map_points array.
goal_prompt:
Visit the public OpenAI careers search page and extract current hiring signals. Capture up to 50 visible open roles. For each role, return signal_type as hiring_opening, plus title, team, location, and evidence_url. Set metrics.growth to the total number of roles captured. Include map_points only when the page text provides enough explicit location context to confidently provide latitude and longitude. If location coordinates are not reliable from the page, return an empty map_points array.

Return only structured JSON that matches this schema exactly:
{"type":"object","required":["captured_at","company","signals","metrics","map_points"],"properties":{"captured_at":{"type":"string"},"company":{"type":"string"},"signals":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["signal_type","title","team","location","evidence_url"],"properties":{"signal_type":{"type":"string"},"title":{"type":"string"},"team":{"type":"string"},"location":{"type":"string"},"evidence_url":{"type":"string"}}}},"metrics":{"type":"object","required":["growth"],"properties":{"growth":{"type":"number"}}},"map_points":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["latitude","longitude","entity_name","signal_type","severity","timestamp","explanation"],"properties":{"latitude":{"type":"number"},"longitude":{"type":"number"},"entity_name":{"type":"string"},"signal_type":{"type":"string"},"severity":{"type":"string"},"timestamp":{"type":"string"},"explanation":{"type":"string"},"cluster_key":{"type":"string"}}}}}}

Stop conditions:
["Stop after up to 50 visible roles are extracted.","Stop when pagination or infinite scroll yields no new roles.","Stop after two consecutive page load failures."]

Structured error handling rules:
{"timeout":{"action":"retry","max_retries":2,"emit_status":"failed"},"layout_changed":{"action":"return_partial_result","emit_status":"failed"},"schema_validation_failed":{"action":"store_raw_payload","emit_status":"validation_error"}}
stop_conditions: Stop after up to 50 visible roles are extracted.
Stop when pagination or infinite scroll yields no new roles.
Stop after two consecutive page load failures.
